supply_chain.dependencies: The Company is reliant on third party contractors' and vendors' ability to deliver services and products as planned for development and redevelopment projects
supply_chain.risks: Supply chain issues may increase costs for labor, materials and leasing; inflationary pressures potentially exacerbated by the imposition of tariffs; labor shortages related to changing immigration policies; time and quality of services and products from third party contractors and vendors may differ from expectations

regulatory_risks: Rent control or rent stabilization laws and regulations that limit ability to charge market rents, increase rents, evict tenants or recover increases in operating expenses
Emergency orders and laws expanding tenants' rights or imposing additional costs on landlords
Eviction moratoria and temporary or permanent legislative restrictions on rent increases and collection efforts
Changes in federal income tax laws affecting REITs
Changes in laws increasing potential liability or operating costs (environmental, development, construction, safety requirements)
Environmental laws and regulations requiring investigation and remediation of hazardous substances
Federal, state and local tax laws
Laws regulating housing and revenue management software and practices
Climate change legislation and regulation requiring increased capital expenditures or operating costs
Privacy and cybersecurity laws including California Consumer Privacy Act (CCPA)
Proposition 13 potential repeal or amendment affecting property tax assessments in California
State and local laws relating to climate risk disclosures and human capital management
Fragmented regulation with respect to corporate responsibility and sustainability initiatives
